stimulus: To grow more efficient catalysts for ammonia synthesis, engineers must be able to image how nitrogen atoms attach to nanostructured metal surfaces in real time. Fortunately, materials ______blank and her team at ETH Zurich have recently developed a high-speed electron-microscopy technique that captures the reaction frame by frame.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. "Materials scientist" is an indefinite role, so the proper name "Aiko Tanaka" is essential identification and is not set off by commas.

Choices A and B are incorrect because they set off the name with one or two commas, implying that "Aiko Tanaka" could be removed without loss of meaning; the name, however, is essential. Choice D is incorrect because a single trailing comma wrongly separates the compound subject from its verb "have…developed."
